content:
The claim that Avril Lavigne died in 2003 is actually a conspiracy theory and not true. Avril Lavigne, the Canadian singer-songwriter, is alive and has been actively releasing music and performing for years after 2003.

This conspiracy originated from a rumor suggesting that Avril Lavigne died shortly after her initial success and was replaced by a look-alike named "Melissa." The theory points to supposed differences in appearance and style between pre- and post-2003 photos and videos as "evidence." However, these claims have no credible basis and have been debunked multiple times.

Avril herself has addressed the rumors in interviews, confirming that she is very much alive. If you want, I can provide more details about her career timeline or clarify anything else.
